signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.tagline: Enter your email and we'll send you a sign-in link.
signIn.sent: If that email is known, a sign-in link is on its way.

consume.error: Sign-in failed. The link may have expired.

duplicateConfirm.title: Create another '{name}'?
duplicateConfirm.body: You already own a family called '{name}'. Same-named families are allowed — creating a second one is fine, just confirming you mean to.

invite.error: We couldn't accept this invite. It may have expired or already been used.
invite.mismatch: This invite is for a different email than your current session. Sign out first, then click the link again.

email.title: Email
email.pending: Check your current inbox to confirm the change.
email.confirmError: Email change failed. The link may have expired.

tree.title: Family tree
tree.error: Could not load the family tree.

empty.title: No one here yet
empty.subtitle: Start your family tree by adding the first person.

confirm.deleteText: This deletes the person row and any links to it. This cannot be undone.

empty.title: Nothing on the horizon
empty.subtitle: Add birthdays or partnerships to start seeing upcoming dates here.

reminderPrefs.heading: Email reminders
reminderPrefs.subtitle: Get one daily email about upcoming family dates.

toasts.email_change_sent: Confirmation email sent to your current address

audit.title: Audit log
audit.empty: No audit entries match the current filters.

confirm.revokeText: {name} will lose access to this family. This cannot be undone.

confirm.cancelText: The recipient will no longer be able to join the family with this invite.

transfer.modalText: Both you and {name} will receive an email. The transfer completes once both of you click the link.
transfer.pendingBanner: Ownership transfer to {name} is pending. From-side: {from}, To-side: {to}.

confirmPage.title: Confirming ownership transfer…
confirmPage.successOne: Your side is confirmed. The other party still needs to click their link.
confirmPage.successBoth: Ownership transferred. The role swap has taken effect.
confirmPage.error: Confirmation failed. The link may have expired.

validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.invite_email_mismatch: This invite was sent to a different email address.
validation.parent_not_older_than_child: A parent must be born before the child.
validation.parent_deceased_before_child: A biological parent must be alive at conception (death more than nine months before the child's birth is not possible).
validation.too_many_biological_parents: A child can have at most two biological parents.
validation.partnership_before_birth: A partnership cannot start before either partner was born.

warning.parent_child_age_gap_under_14y: Heads up: the age gap between parent and child is under 14 years.
warning.sibling_partnership: Heads up: the two partners share at least one parent.
warning.end_reason_death_mismatch: Heads up: end reason is 'death' but no partner has a matching date of death.

errorCodes.relationship_cycle: That link would create a cycle in the family tree.
errorCodes.partnership_duplicate: A current partnership of the same kind already exists for these partners.
errorCodes.person_not_editable: You don't have permission to edit this person.
errorCodes.membership_not_found: That member is no longer part of this family.
errorCodes.contact_not_editable: You don't have permission to edit this contact.
errorCodes.family_not_member: You're not a member of this family.
errorCodes.family_insufficient_role: You need admin or owner rights to do this.
errorCodes.conflict_stale: Someone else updated this just now. Reload and try again.
errorCodes.email_taken: That email address is already in use.
errorCodes.invite_duplicate: An invite is already pending for that email address.
errorCodes.owner_transfer_pending: An ownership transfer is already pending for this family.
errorCodes.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errorCodes.upstream: An upstream service is unavailable. Please retry shortly.
errorCodes.internal: Something went wrong on our side. The team has been notified.
errorCodes.session_expired: Your session expired — please sign in again.

hero.title: Map your family. Share what matters.
hero.lede: My Family Tree organises the people in your family, the relationships between them, and the dates worth remembering — without giving any of it to a third party.
hero.imageAlt: A family of sloths hanging together from a branch

relations.title: One tree, every relation.
relations.body: Parents, children, partners — the structure follows real families, not a single straight line.

reminders.title: Gentle reminders.
reminders.body: A short digest email lands a few days before each birthday or anniversary. Off by default; on when you want it.

privacy.title: Yours alone.
privacy.body: No analytics, no tracking, no third-party scripts. The only cookies are the ones that keep you signed in.

screenshot.alt: A family tree rendered in My Family Tree — parents at the top, children below, partner pairs joined with a soft heart connector.
screenshot.caption: A real family tree, rendered from real records. Click any person to open their full profile; hover to trace inheritance.

footer.tagline: © 2026 Slothlike. Built with Rust and Vue.js.

links.sourceAria: Open source on GitHub — heart-coded by Slothlike

imprint.title: Imprint

disclaimer.heading: Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: Despite careful content control, we assume no liability for the content of external links.

linkLiability.heading: Liability for links
linkLiability.body: The site contains links to third-party websites over which we exercise no control and therefore accept no responsibility for external materials.

imprint.footerNote: © 2026 Slothlike. All rights reserved. Built with Rust and Vue.js.

introduction.heading: Introduction
introduction.body: Your privacy is important to us. My Family Tree is built privacy-first — we collect only what you ask the app to hold for you, and the minimum required to keep you signed in. No analytics, no trackers, no marketing cookies.

dataCollection.heading: Data Collection
dataCollection.publicBody: When you browse our public pages (home, imprint, this policy) without signing in, we do not collect personal data. No cookies are set, no information is logged in our application beyond what the hosting infrastructure keeps for security (IP plus timestamp, retained 14 days, then purged).
dataCollection.appBody: When you create an account, we store the data you give the app: your email address, the people you add to your tree (names, dates, places, relationships, photos you upload, contact details), and your reminder preferences. This data lives on our infrastructure inside the EU. We do not share it with third parties, we do not sell it, and we do not use it to train anything. You can delete your account at any time, which removes your data with it.

cookies.heading: Cookies
cookies.intro: My Family Tree uses two strictly-necessary cookies, both for authentication, both HttpOnly (your browser never exposes them to JavaScript), both flagged Secure in production. We use no other cookies — no tracking, no marketing, no preference cookies. Your theme and language choices stay in your browser's localStorage and never reach our server.
cookies.access: access — a short-lived JSON Web Token (about 15 minutes). Sent on every API request to prove who you are.
cookies.refresh: refresh — a longer-lived opaque token (about 30 days). Scoped to /auth/refresh only. When the access token expires, the browser silently swaps the refresh token for a fresh one so you are not signed out mid-action.
cookies.rationale: The short-lived access token limits the damage if a token ever leaks; the refresh token only travels on the renewal request, never on a normal API call, so its attack surface is narrow.

analytics.heading: Analytics
analytics.body: We do not use any analytics, tracking tools or third-party services on this site. No Google Analytics, no Plausible, no Matomo, no Sentry. No embedded YouTube, Vimeo, social widgets or externally-hosted fonts. Every asset the site loads is served from our own infrastructure.

rights.heading: Your Rights
rights.lead: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
items: Right to information about stored data
Right to correction of incorrect data
rights.trail: Send any such request to {email}. You also have the right to complain to your local data-protection authority.

security.heading: Data Security
security.body: We use technical and organizational security measures to protect your data against accidental or intentional manipulation, loss, destruction, or access by unauthorized persons. In practical terms: TLS-encrypted transport, encrypted backups, role-based server-side access, and the cookie discipline described above. We report breaches within 72 hours of discovery as required by Art. 33 GDPR.

changes.heading: Changes to this Privacy Policy
changes.body: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy to reflect changes in our data processing practices or legal requirements. The new version replaces this one in place; the change date below shows when it last moved.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or data protection, please write to {email}, or use the postal address given in the imprint.
